_comment: Entity registry — source of truth for entity completeness. Run `npm run entity:audit` to validate against disk.

entities.personality: Swarming insect scout. Orbits target, hops in, retreats. Dumb but numerous.

designNotes.sprite: Squat hexapod the size of a fist: broad thorax, stubby limbs ending in hooked claws, and two oversized compound eyes that catch light at odd angles. Chitin is mottled olive-black with acid-green bioluminescent spots along the abdomen seam. Moves in quick, jerky bursts — joints bend the wrong way, like a crab crossed with a beetle. Reads clearly at 28×28 px in-game: bold silhouette, high-contrast eye glow, no fine detail needed.

animations.idle: Slow, asymmetric abdominal pulse — one side inflates fractionally more than the other, giving a subtly lopsided breathing rhythm. Antennae twitch independently every 2–3 frames. 6–8 frames at 5–6 fps.
animations.walk: Rapid tripod gait: three legs step while three remain planted, alternating. Body bobs slightly with each stride. Antennae fold back against thorax when at speed. 8 frames at 10 fps.
animations.attack: Wind-up (3 frames): rear up on hind four legs, forelegs raised and mandibles spread wide. Commit (2 frames): lunge forward, body fully extended, mandibles snapping shut. Recovery (2 frames): pull back to neutral. 7 frames total at 12 fps.
animations.hurt: Sharp full-body recoil backward — limbs flail outward for one frame, then clamp tight. Abdomen brightens (desaturated flash) for one frame. 3 frames at 10 fps.
animations.death: Topple sideways over 4 frames, legs curling inward sequentially from front to back. Bioluminescent spots dim from acid-green to grey across the sequence. Holds on final frame (legs curled, eyes dark). 5 frames at 8 fps.

sounds.ambient: Dry insect click — thin, aperiodic. ~80–150 ms. Like a beetle tapping chitin. Freesound: 'insect click short CC0', 'cricket stridulation single', 'beetle tap'.
sounds.aggro: Rapid burst of 4–6 clicks accelerating to a chittering trill — alert call when spotting prey. ~350 ms. Freesound: 'insect alarm chitter', 'beetle stridulation burst', 'cricket rapid chirp'.
sounds.attack: Hard mandible snap — single dry click with slight resonance, like two pieces of hard plastic snapping together. ~80 ms. Freesound: 'mandible snap', 'insect bite click', 'plastic snap short'.
sounds.hurt: High-pitched chitin crack — sharp, short, slightly hollow. Suggests shell damage. ~100 ms. Freesound: 'chitin crack', 'glass light click', 'insect hit high'.
sounds.death: Rapid diminishing chitter (4–5 clicks slowing) ending in a dull thud as the body drops. ~500 ms total. Freesound: 'insect death stridulation', 'beetle dying clicks', 'creature death small'.

entities.personality: Hatchling rush unit. Tiny, fast, no special behavior. Comes in large groups.
Apex predator. Burrows underground, surfaces near player with a jump-charge. Reads juvenile activity to time eruptions.
Tongue-puller. Roots targets at range, hops in to melee.
Dust-cloud ambusher. Hides until player is close, then bursts.
Pack hunter. Coordinates with allies — holds back until pack has numbers.
Spine-shooter. Ranged attacker with short memory — fires from cover, retreats when threatened.
Passive drifter. Floats slowly, detonates spore cloud on contact or death.
Slow tank. Absorbs damage, cleaves in a wide arc. Very loud footsteps.
Phase-shifter. Briefly intangible, dashes through walls to reposition.
Static structure. Spawns hatchlings on timer, priority target for players.
Egg-layer boss. Moves slowly, continuously spawns EggSacs. Must be eliminated to stop reinforcements.
Disguises as floor debris. Reveals and charges when player gets close.
Spawner elite. Hangs back, periodically births minions. Must be killed to stop reinforcements.
Rooted hazard. Cannot move. Attacks anything within melee reach via thorn lash.
Poison melee ambusher. Closes quickly, applies DOT on hit, retreats to let poison work.
Corrupted flying drone. Fast, ranged. Erratic movement pattern from glitch state.
Electrified ground unit. Leaves static discharge on tiles it crosses.
Berserk melee charger. Takes reduced damage while charging, deals massive impact hit.
Static support unit. Disrupts hero abilities in its radius. Must be destroyed first.
Slow armored vehicle. Deploys infantry, fires turret. High HP, weak rear armor.
Assembled from debris. Loses limbs as HP drops, each phase changes attack pattern.
Elite mech. Multi-phase boss. Long memory — hunts player across the full arena.
Damaged TitanPrototype — one half functional. Erratic, rage-mode attacks.
Relentless pursuer. Never loses target. Long sight, long memory, flanks around obstacles.
Intangible anomaly. Ignores walls, drains hero energy on contact.
Coordination node. Buffs allied units nearby. Destroying it panics its swarm.
Stone construct. Slow and telegraphed, but hits through shields. Cracks deepen as HP drops.
Ranged gunslinger. Pistol with limited mag, must reload. Dash to reposition.
Heavy melee. Slow but armored. Signature ability: wing-slam AOE.
Shield bearer. Blocks projectiles from the front, charges forward to stun.
Time manipulator. Slows enemies in AOE, blinks short distances, very fragile.
Support medic. Heals allies, applies shields, weak in direct combat.
Engineer. Deploys turrets and proximity mines. Fights from behind cover.
Hybrid attacker. Fast melee, short-range dash, moderate durability.
Adaptive hybrid. Changes combat style based on absorbed enemy traits.
Brawler tank. High HP, no ranged option. Signature: ground slam that stuns.
Swarm commander. Controls allied units telepathically. Fragile solo, dominant in groups.
Symbiont host. Dual-mode: host body fights normally, symbiont can detach as scout.
Apex soarer. Circles without urgency. Does not attack — waits until the moment is right.

designNotes.sprite: Wide-winged raptor seen from high top-down — wingspan roughly 2× the sprite width. Plumage is earthy brown and ochre but with patches of colour that are slightly too vivid: acid greens on the wing coverts, deep russet on the throat. The corruption has not changed its shape, only pushed the colours just past what feels natural. A thick hooked beak and broad fanned tail are the clearest silhouette markers at 32px. Talons visible as two small dark hooks below the wingtips.

animations.idle: Slow thermal soar — minimal wing movement. Wingtips flex up once every 3–4 frames as the bird adjusts on the updraft. Head turns side to side independently. 8 frames at 5 fps. Should feel weightless and patient.
animations.walk: Powered flapping flight for level movement. Full wing-beat cycle: down-stroke (2 frames, body dips) then up-stroke (2 frames, body rises). 6 frames at 10 fps.
animations.attack: Wind-up (4 frames): wings fold tight against body, head drops forward into a stoop, talons drawn forward — this is the player's warning window. Commit (2 frames): full-speed dive, wings near-closed, talons fully extended. Recovery (3 frames): wings snap wide to brake, body sweeps upward. 9 frames at 14 fps.
animations.hurt: One wing snaps back sharply, body rotates 15–20° off-axis. Opposite wing beats twice to recover. 3 frames at 12 fps.
animations.death: Wings lose symmetry — one folds inward while the other beats weakly. The bird enters a tight spiral descent over 6 frames, then a flat impact frame (body splayed against ground), then holds. 7 frames at 10 fps.

sounds.ambient: Low feather-rush whoosh of soaring wings, barely audible at distance. ~200 ms. Freesound: 'eagle wing beats soaring CC0', 'large raptor flight wind overhead', 'bird wing adjustment feather rustle'.
sounds.aggro: Full predatory scream — sharp, high, carrying. The 'I see you' moment. ~400 ms. Freesound: 'eagle scream predatory CC0', 'golden eagle attack scream loud', 'raptor screech aggressive'.
sounds.attack: Two cues: (1) rushing air crescendo as bird stoops (~300 ms, timed to wind-up frames) + (2) heavy talon impact thud (~80 ms, timed to commit frame). Freesound windup: 'bird dive stoop wind rush CC0'. Impact: 'talon strike CC0', 'raptor grab impact'.
sounds.hurt: Sharp broken shriek, high and short, suggests surprise. ~150 ms per variant. Freesound: 'eagle pain shriek short CC0', 'raptor distress call sharp', 'large bird hurt flapping CC0'.
sounds.death: Descending cry — starts at full pitch, drops in volume and frequency over ~400 ms, ends with a dull impact thud. ~600 ms total. Freesound: 'eagle dying descending call CC0', 'raptor death spiral call fade', 'large bird crash land'.

entities.personality: Curious, resourceful boy scout. Tier-0 protagonist. Player-controlled. Attacks with a wooden slingshot.

designNotes.sprite: 10-year-old Scandinavian boy scout: chibi-proportioned, ash blond hair under a warm green knit hat, lightweight earthy green/brown hiking jacket, fingerless gloves, heavy hiking boots, small backpack, binoculars around neck. Holds a wooden Y-fork slingshot. Reads clearly at 32x32px — bold hat silhouette and backpack bump are the key silhouette markers.

animations.idle: Subtle breathing — chest and backpack bob slightly. Loke glances side to side every 4-5 cycles, binoculars swinging gently. 6-8 frames at 6 fps.
animations.walk: Brisk walking gait with slight arm swing. Backpack bobs. Binoculars sway. 4 frames at 8 fps.
animations.attack: Pull slingshot pouch back with both hands (2 frames wind-up), release with full-body snap-forward recoil (1 frame commit), return to ready stance (2 frames recovery). 5 frames at 12 fps.
animations.hurt: Sharp backward flinch, arms splaying out, hat tilting. 3 frames at 10 fps.
animations.death: Stumble then fall backward, landing flat. Backpack hits ground last. 5 frames at 8 fps.

sounds.ambient: Light forest ambience — distant birds, wind in leaves. Not a creature sound, more environmental presence when Loke is idle outdoors.
sounds.attack: Elastic snap of slingshot release — sharp twang/pop. ~60 ms. Optionally a brief whoosh of the projectile. Freesound: 'slingshot release', 'elastic snap', 'rubber band twang'.
sounds.hurt: Young boy pained grunt — short, surprised. Non-violent, age-appropriate. ~150 ms.
sounds.death: Soft thud of a small body falling, followed by a quiet sorrowful exhale. ~600 ms total.

entities.personality: Loke post-promotion. Field operator and gadget specialist. Slower than Tinkerer but tankier — exo-frame plating and a full deployable kit (Sentry Turret, Scout Drone, Proximity Mine, Barrier Shield). M12 Carbine as primary.

designNotes.sprite: Loke as T3 Combat Engineer. Same facial features and ash-blond hair as Tinkerer-Loke, now older and harder. Milspec operator kit: olive-drab webbing vest, exo-frame reinforcement at shoulders and knees, M12 carbine held low-ready, utility pouches on belt, flip-up HUD visor on helmet. 32x32 top-down pixel art. Matches the Tinkerer-Loke colour palette — swap canvas jacket for exo-frame plating, keep face and hair identical.

animations.idle: Combat-ready idle: slight sway, head scanning side to side, carbine held diagonally across body. 6-8 frames at 6 fps.
animations.walk: Tactical walk: low-crouch movement, carbine raised, slight bob. 4 frames at 8 fps.
animations.attack: Carbine burst: pull up to aim (1 frame), fire with muzzle flash and recoil (2 frames), lower back to ready (1 frame). 4 frames at 12 fps.
animations.hurt: Sharp backward stagger, head flinch, visor flips up. 3 frames at 10 fps.
animations.death: Heavy armored fall — tips forward onto one knee, then collapses sideways. Exo-frame impact. 5 frames at 8 fps.

sounds.aggro: Heavy boot step + mechanical exo-frame servo whine as CE takes a combat stance.
sounds.attack: M12 Carbine burst: 3 rapid mechanical cracks (semi-auto rifle tone), brass ejection clink. ~200 ms total.
sounds.hurt: Exo-frame impact crunch + grunt. Armoured hit — muffled, deeper than Tinkerer hurt.
sounds.death: Heavy armored collapse: servo failure whine, then weighted metal-on-stone thud.
